entities.name: FUSARIUM
entities.description: A diverse fungal genus that affects several crops globally and contaminates grains.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop (Sorghum Bicolor L. Moench) whose grains were analyzed for Fusarium contamination in Ethiopia.

entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A crop (Eleusine Coracana L. Garten) whose grains were analyzed for Fusarium contamination in Ethiopia.

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country from which sorghum and finger millet grain samples were collected.

entities.name: MYCOLOGICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing grain samples to detect fungal contamination.

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing gene primers to determine the evolutionary relationships of isolates.

entities.name: EF-1Α
entities.description: A gene primer used for the phylogenetic analysis of Fusarium isolates.

entities.name: Β-TUBULIN
entities.description: A gene primer used for the phylogenetic analysis of Fusarium isolates.

entities.name: F. INCARNATUM–EQUISETI SPECIES COMPLEX
entities.description: A species complex within the Fusarium genus to which several isolates showed a close phylogenetic relation.

entities.name: APICAL CELLS OF MACROCONIDIA
entities.description: A morphological feature of the fungus used to justify the identification of new species.

entities.name: TOXIN PRODUCTION POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of a Fusarium species to produce toxins, requiring further investigation.

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of fungal species existing within the Fusarium genus.
